title: # OmniScript - Metadata API
description:
## Description

Represents an OmniScript for the Discovery Framework, which guides users through sales, service, and other business processes. For Discovery Framework, the customization type is discoveryframework.

assessmentDefinitionMetadata.description: Metadata associated with an assessment definition. Available in API version 64.0 and later.

customJavaScript.description: The custom JavaScript used for an OmniScript.

designerCustomizationType.description: The Omnistudio designer customization type. NoteTo create assessment questions using the Discovery Framework feature, use the customization type as discoveryframework.

elementTypeComponentMapping.description: Overrides all elements of one type with a custom Lightning web component by mapping the element type to the Custom LWC.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the status of the OmniProcessElement is active (true) or not (false).

isIntegrationProcedure.description: Indicates whether OmniScript is an Integration Procedure (true) or OmniScript metadata (false). The default value is false.

isManagedUsingStdDesigner.description: Indicates whether Omniscript is managed using standard designer (true) or not (false). Available in API version 64.0 and later.

isMetadataCacheDisabled.description: Indicates whether metadata cache for the integration procedure is disabled (true) or not (false). The default value is false.

isOmniScriptEmbeddable.description: Indicates whether the OmniScript with the OmniProcessElement can be embedded in other OmniScripts (true) or not (false).

isTestProcedure.description: Indicates whether OmniScript is a test procedure setting (true) or not (false). The default value is false

isWebCompEnabled.description: Indicates whether web component OmniScript (not Angular) is enabled (true) or not (false). The default value is false

lastPreviewPage.description: The last page previewed in the OmniScript designer.

namespace.description: The namespace associated with this OmniScript record.

omniAssessmentTasks.description: The omniAssessmentTasks associated with the OmniScript. Available in API version 63.0 and later. This field is available only if the Dynamic Assessment Access license is enabled.

omniProcessElements.description: The OmniProcessElements associated with the OmniScript.

omniProcessType.description: Integration Procedure or OmniScript. Possible value is: OmniScript

propertySetConfig.description: The property set of the OmniProcessElement.

questionDevName.description: The developer name of the assessment question in the OmniScript. NoteThis field is relevant only for OmniScripts with designerCustomizationType as discoveryframework.

requiredPermission.description: The required permissions to execute the integration procedure.

responseCacheType.description: Response cache used for the integration procedure (session or Org).

type.description: The OmniProcessElement type. For example, Text and TextArea.

uniqueName.description: A unique name for the omni assessment task.

webComponentKey.description: Internal unique key for the generated Lightning Web Components (LWC).

approvalDateTime.description: The date and time when the assessment definition was approved.

displayType.description: The display type of the assessment definition.

effectiveFromDate.description: The date and time from which the assessment definition is effective.

effectiveToDate.description: The date and time until which the assessment definition is effective.

lastRevisedDateTime.description: The date and time when the assessment definition was last revised.

performerType.description: The performer type of the assessment definition.

purpose.description: The purpose of the assessment definition.

name.description: The name of the omni assessment task.

status.description: The status of the omni assessment task.

uniqueName.description: A unique name for the omni assessment task.

wsdl_segment:
## WSDL Segment

The following WSDL Segment shows the complete structure of this metadata type:

```xml
<xsd:complexType name="AssessmentDefinitionMetadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="approvalDateTime" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:dateTime"/>
    <xsd:element name="displayType" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="effectiveFromDate" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:dateTime"/>
    <xsd:element name="effectiveToDate" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:dateTime"/>
    <xsd:element name="lastRevisedDateTime" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:dateTime"/>
    <xsd:element name="performerType" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="purpose" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="OmniAssessmentTaskMetadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="name" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="status" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="uniqueName" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="OmniProcessElement">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="childElements" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:OmniProcessElement"/>
    <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="designerCustomizationType" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="discoveryFrameworkUsageType" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="embeddedOmniScriptKey" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="isActive" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
    <xsd:element name="isOmniScriptEmbeddable" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
    <xsd:element name="level" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:double"/>
    <xsd:element name="name" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="omniProcessVersionNumber" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:double"/>
    <xsd:element name="parentElementName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="parentElementType" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="propertySetConfig" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="sequenceNumber" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:double"/>
    <xsd:element name="type" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="uniqueIndex" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="OmniProcessType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="OmniScript"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="OmniScript">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="assessmentDefinitionMetadata" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AssessmentDefinitionMetadata"/>
        <xsd:element name="customHtmlTemplates" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="customJavaScript" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="designerCustomizationType" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="elementTypeComponentMapping" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="isActive" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="isIntegrationProcedure" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="isManagedUsingStdDesigner" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="isMetadataCacheDisabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="isOmniScriptEmbeddable" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="isTestProcedure" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="isWebCompEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="language" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="lastPreviewPage" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="name" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="nameSpace" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="omniAssessmentTasks" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:OmniAssessmentTaskMetadata"/>
        <xsd:element name="omniProcessElements" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:OmniProcessElement"/>
        <xsd:element name="omniProcessKey" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="omniProcessType" type="tns:OmniProcessType"/>
        <xsd:element name="overrideKey" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="propertySetConfig" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="requiredPermission" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="responseCacheType" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="subType" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="type" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="uniqueName" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="versionNumber" type="xsd:double"/>
        <xsd:element name="webComponentKey" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
